message:
feat(widgets): choreographic programming for multi-widget interactions (bd-14k2m)

Implement a choreography DSL that defines coordinated multi-widget behavior
from a global perspective and automatically projects to per-widget message
handlers, guaranteeing completeness by construction.

Core API: Choreography::new(name), step(participant, Action), project() →
Projection with per-widget handlers, verify_deadlock_free(), completeness_report(),
execute_choreography() for simulation.

Verification: deadlock-freedom (emit-before-handle ordering, no cycles),
completeness (no unhandled messages, no orphaned handlers).

5 example choreographies: filter_update, selection_sync, tab_navigation,
search_flow (chained messages), modal_dialog.

18 tests: deadlock-free verification, projection correctness, completeness
reporting, orphaned/unhandled detection, circular dependency detection,
execution simulation, determinism, manual vs choreographic comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
